description: Built-in multi-agent staged workflow graph templates.

templates.name: Team Coding: Parallel Edit → Consensus → Review
templates.description: Multi-agent team workflow: two implementation agents work in parallel, an arbiter resolves conflicts, and a reviewer validates the result.

nodes.prompt_template: You are implementation agent A. Task: {task}. Proceed with the edit.
You are implementation agent B. Task: {task}. Propose the optimal solution.

templates.name: Coding: Plan → Edit → Review
templates.description: Three-stage coding workflow: planner reads and plans, editor implements, reviewer validates.

nodes.prompt_template: You are the planning agent. Read the codebase and produce a detailed plan to: {task}. Output a numbered action list only — no code yet.

templates.name: Research: Search → Analyze → Summarize
templates.description: Three-stage research workflow: searcher gathers data, analyst extracts insights, summarizer produces the final report.

nodes.prompt_template: You are the search agent. Find and collect all relevant information about: {task}. Output a structured list of findings.

templates.name: Security: Scan → Assess → Report
templates.description: Security audit workflow: scanner finds issues, assessor rates severity, reporter produces remediation plan.

nodes.prompt_template: You are the security scanner. Examine the codebase for vulnerabilities related to: {task}. List all findings with file and line references.

templates.name: Deploy: Stage → Verify → Promote
templates.description: Staged deployment workflow: stager prepares the deploy, verifier runs smoke checks, promoter finalizes.

nodes.prompt_template: You are the staging agent. Prepare a deploy plan for: {task}. Include pre-checks, service sequence, and rollback steps.
